content: We can reframe Self-Refine as a primitive single-perspective seed that can be expanded into a multi-perspective LLM self-reflection framework, where each iteration of Self-Refine is bootstrapped from inconsistent solution perspectives pulled from the LLM's own parametric memory. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no additional training or labeled data, while leveraging the diverse critical feedback of multi-perspective reflection to outperform both original approaches.
